Prepare AUDIT # Do not submit to RDOC
```{r}
AUDIT<-left_join(filter(cleaned_survey_data, grepl("AUDIT",item)) %>%
                 mutate(value=as.numeric(value)) %>% 
                 filter(!is.na(value)) %>%
                 filter(!value=="") %>%
                 distinct(tagid,item,value,survey_name,.keep_all = FALSE) %>%
                 spread(item,value),
               redcap_cleaned %>%
                 filter(!is.na(dob),!is.na(sa_date)) %>%
                 dplyr::select(tagid, sa_date, sb_date, dob),by="tagid")         

AUDIT_Wave1<-left_join(AUDIT,survey_date, by = c("tagid","survey_name")) %>% 
  distinct(tagid,survey_name,.keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(qualtrics_date=value) %>%
  dplyr::select(-value)%>%
  mutate(survey_date=ifelse(survey_name=="TAG - Sess 2 - V1",sb_date,
                            ifelse(survey_name=="TAG - Sess 2 - V2",sb_date,
                                   ifelse(survey_name=="TAG - Sess 2 - V3 - Current",sb_date,
                                          ifelse(survey_name=="Sensitive Q's for 042",sb_date,as.character(qualtrics_date)
                                          ))))) %>%
  dplyr::select(-qualtrics_date,-sb_date,-sa_date,-dob) %>%
  distinct(tagid,survey_name,.keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(AUDIT_1=ifelse(AUDIT_1==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_1==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_1==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_1==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_1==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_1))))),
         AUDIT_2=ifelse(AUDIT_2==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_2==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_2==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_2==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_2==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_2))))),
         AUDIT_3=ifelse(AUDIT_3==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_3==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_3==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_3==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_3==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_3))))),
         AUDIT_4=ifelse(AUDIT_4==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_4==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_4==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_4==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_4==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_4))))),
         AUDIT_5=ifelse(AUDIT_5==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_5==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_5==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_5==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_5==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_5))))),
         AUDIT_6=ifelse(AUDIT_6==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_6==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_6==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_6==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_6==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_6))))),
         AUDIT_7=ifelse(AUDIT_7==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_7==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_7==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_7==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_7==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_7))))),
         AUDIT_8=ifelse(AUDIT_8==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_8==2,1,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_8==3,2,
                                       ifelse(AUDIT_8==4,3,
                                              ifelse(AUDIT_8==5,4,
                                                     AUDIT_8))))),
         AUDIT_9=ifelse(AUDIT_9==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_9==2,2,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_9==5,4,AUDIT_9))),
         AUDIT_10=ifelse(AUDIT_10==1,0,
                         ifelse(AUDIT_10==3,2,
                                ifelse(AUDIT_10==5,4,AUDIT_10)))) %>%
  mutate(AUDIT_total=rowSums(cbind(AUDIT_1, AUDIT_2, AUDIT_3, 
                                   AUDIT_4, AUDIT_5, AUDIT_6, 
                                   AUDIT_7, AUDIT_8, AUDIT_9, 
                                   AUDIT_10), na.rm=F))

## Save it
AUDIT_Wave1_TAG2_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(!grepl("W2|W3|W4|W5|W6",survey_name)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TAG0|TAG1|TAG2",tagid))
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave1_TAG2_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave1/AUDIT_Wave1_TAG2.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave2_TAG2_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W2",survey_name)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TAG0|TAG1|TAG2",tagid))
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave2_TAG2_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave2/AUDIT_Wave2_TAG2.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave3_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W3",survey_name)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TAG3|TAG4",tagid)) 
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave3_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave3/AUDIT_Wave3.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave3_TAG2_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W3",survey_name)) %>% 
  filter(!grepl("TAG0|TAG1|TAG2",tagid))
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave3_TAG2_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave3/AUDIT_Wave3_TAG2.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave4_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W4",survey_name)) 
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave4_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave4/AUDIT_Wave4.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave5_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W5",survey_name)) 
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave5_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave5/AUDIT_Wave5.csv"))

AUDIT_Wave6_outdf <- AUDIT_Wave1 %>% filter(grepl("W6",survey_name)) 
write.csv(AUDIT_Wave6_outdf, file = paste0(workdir,"Qualtrics_Output/Wave6/AUDIT_Wave6.csv"))
```
